sourceList.title: Elisabeth of Poland, "Find A Grave Index"
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ELŹBIETA ([1152]-2 Apr 1209, bur Kloster Dobrilugk).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - ELŹBIETA of Poland, widow of SOBĚSLAV II Duke of Bohemia, daughter of MIESZKO III "Stary/the Old" Prince of Greater Poland & his first wife Erszébet of Hungary ([1152]-2 Apr 1209, bur Kloster Dobrilugk).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia於1152年出生在波蘭時，她的父親Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland26歲，母親Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné24歲。她於從大約1173年到1177年與Sobeslaus von Böhmen II結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1209年4月2日在德國布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特享年57歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 盧考多布利盧可 奧額爾斯特多盧格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia于1152年出生在波兰时，她的父亲Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland26岁，母亲Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné24岁。她于从大约1173年到1177年与Sobeslaus von Böhmen II结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1209年4月2日在德国布藍登波格藍德可萊斯 艾爾-爾斯特享年57岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 盧考多布利盧可 奧額爾斯特多盧格。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: occupational name from Middle Low German pravest ‘provost’. See also Provost .
German: nickname for an ostentatious person, from Middle High German brast ‘pageantry, show, display’.
Austrian German: dialect form of   Propst  .

variants.name: Provost
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Andre, Emile, Camille, Lucien, Normand, Alphonse, Cecile, Gilles, Jacques.
French: northern and western variant of Prévost (see Prevost ) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (compare 2 below).

English: occupational name from Middle English provost, provest, proust ‘provost, steward, representative’ (Old English prafost), also used for the head of a religious chapter or educational establishment, or, since such officials were usually clergy and celibate, a nickname for a self-important person.

nameMeanings.name: Elzbieta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia was born in 1152, in Poland, her father, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, was 26 and her mother, Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné, was 24. She married Sobeslaus von Böhmen II from about 1173 to 1177. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 2 April 1209, in Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germany, at the age of 57, and was buried in Doberlug, Dobrilugk Oberförsterei, Luckau, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia est née en 1152, à Pologne, son père, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sobeslaus von Böhmen II du environ 1173 au 1177. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1209, à Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Doberlug, Dobrilugk Oberförsterei, Kreis Luckau, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia 1152 in Polen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland 26 und ihre Mutter Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné 24. Sie hat von um 1173 bis 1177 Sobeslaus von Böhmen II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 2. April 1209 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Deutschland und wurde in Doberlug, Dobrilugk Oberförsterei, Kreis Luckau, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia è nata il nel 1152 nel Polonia, sua padre, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sobeslaus von Böhmen II da circa 1173 a 1177. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 2 aprile 1209, nel Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germania, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Doberlug, Dobrilugk Oberförsterei, Kreis Luckau, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemiaが1152年にポーランドで生まれた時，父Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Polandは26歳，母Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemnéは24歳であった。から約1173年まで1177年にSobeslaus von Böhmen IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1209年4月2日にドイツブランデンブルグランドクレイス エルベ-エルスターで57歳で死去し，ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ブランデンブルグクレイス ルクアウドブリルグク オバーフoルステレイドバールグにて埋葬された。

ko.Lausitz, Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Germa: 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 엘브-스터 바드 리벤워다 로짓즈
ko.Dobrilugk, Brandenburg, Prussia: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 뤼c코 도브리루그크 오버프o르스테레이 도벌루그
ko.Groitzsch, Groitzsch, Kreis Delitzsch, F: 독일 작센 크레이스 데리츠슈 그로이츠슈 그로이츠슈
ko.lifeSummary: Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia(이)가 1152년 폴란드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1173년 부터 1177년 까지 Sobeslaus von Böhmen II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1209년 4월 2일 독일 브랜덴버그 랜드크레이스 엘브-스터에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 뤼c코 도브리루그크 오버프o르스테레이 도벌루그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia nasceu em 1152, em Polônia, seu pai, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sobeslaus von Böhmen II de aproximadamente 1173 a 1177. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1209, em Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Doberlug, Dobrilugk Oberförsterei, Kreis Luckau, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia родилась в 1152 г. в местности Польша, её отцу по имени Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sobeslaus von Böhmen II с около 1173 по 1177. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 2 апреля 1209 г. в местности ландкрис элбе-елстир, брэнденбург, Германия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности добирлуг, добрилугк обирфoрстири, крис луккау, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elzbieta Piast Duchess of Bohemia nació en 1152, en Polonia, su papá, Mieszko III the Old Duke of Greater Poland, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Erzsébet Árpád-házi Magyar hercegnő, lengyel fejedelemné, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sobeslaus von Böhmen II desde aproximadamente 1173 hasta 1177. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 2 de abril de 1209, en Landkreis Elbe-Elster, Brandenburg, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Doberlug, Dobrilugk Oberförsterei, Kreis Luckau, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemania.
